Bash(git -C /c/Users/lenovo/Desktop/fin commit -m "feat\(auth\): auto-generated passwords + force change on first login + SUPER_ADMIN protection + disable public registration" -m "1\) Auto-generated initial password:" -m "   - createUser no longer requires the admin to type a password" -m "   - Backend generates a 10-char strong password \(no ambiguous chars\)" -m "   - response includes generatedPassword once, admin sees a modal with copy button" -m "   - User.requiresPasswordChange is set to true so first login forces a change" -m "2\) Mandatory password change on first login:" -m "   - loginUser accepts both bcrypt password and legacy temporaryCode" -m "   - If requiresPasswordChange=true, returns the change-password form trigger" -m "   - changeFirstPassword accepts either secret to authorise the change" -m "3\) Public registration tab disabled:" -m "   - Login page no longer shows 'إنشاء حساب' tab" -m "   - 'Check status' box hidden as well" -m "   - /api/auth/employee-register returns 403 with code REGISTRATION_DISABLED" -m "   - Welcome message updated to direct users to contact admin" -m "4\) SUPER_ADMIN protection \(strict\):" -m "   - GET /api/users strips plainPassword/temporaryCode/sessionToken from SUPER_ADMIN rows for non-self requesters" -m "   - PUT /api/users/:id/password blocks SUPER_ADMIN targets" -m "   - DELETE /api/users/:id blocks SUPER_ADMIN targets" -m "   - PUT /api/users/:id/activate blocks SUPER_ADMIN targets" -m "   - Frontend: hides reveal/edit/delete action buttons for protected SUPER_ADMINs" -m "   - Frontend: shows '🔒 محمي' placeholder instead of the password row")

Bash(git -C /c/Users/lenovo/Desktop/fin commit -m "security: defense-in-depth — RoleGuard + audit forbidden attempts + harden headers" -m "Even though backend already rejects unauthorized API calls, add layers so a smart insider cannot even SEE the admin UI:" -m "1\) Frontend RoleGuard component wraps admin routes:" -m "   - /dashboard/users -> IT_SUPPORT/ADMIN/SUPER_ADMIN only" -m "   - /dashboard/trash -> IT_SUPPORT/ADMIN/SUPER_ADMIN only" -m "   - /dashboard/assets -> IT_SUPPORT/ADMIN/SUPER_ADMIN only" -m "   - /dashboard/archive -> ADMIN/SUPER_ADMIN only" -m "   - /dashboard/security-logs -> ADMIN/SUPER_ADMIN only" -m "   - Unauthorized users redirected to /dashboard automatically" -m "2\) authMiddleware.authorize\(\) now logs every blocked attempt to SecurityLog:" -m "   - Records method + URL + required roles + actual role" -m "   - Surfaces in the Activity Log page so admins see tampering attempts" -m "   - Error message no longer leaks required roles" -m "3\) Helmet hardened:" -m "   - HSTS \(force HTTPS 6 months\)" -m "   - frameguard deny \(clickjacking defense\)" -m "   - noSniff, hidePoweredBy, strict-origin-when-cross-origin referrer" -m "4\) Cache-Control: no-store on every /api/* response so tokens never linger in browser cache on shared machines." -m "Note: the JS bundle itself is always visible to clients \(that's how the web works\). Sourcemaps are already disabled, console.log is stripped in prod, and terser minifies everything. The strings 'ADMIN'/'SUPER_ADMIN' in the bundle are just for UI show/hide — backend rejects every actual privileged call from non-privileged JWTs.")

Bash(git -C /c/Users/lenovo/Desktop/fin commit -m "feat: rename 'Asset' to 'Custody' \(UI\) + fix FAQ shortcuts + activity log table view" -m "1\) UI terminology change \(DB/API untouched\):" -m "   - 'الأصول التقنية' -> 'إدارة العهد'" -m "   - 'أجهزتي' -> 'عهدتي'" -m "   - 'رقم الأصل' -> 'رقم العهدة'" -m "   - 'إضافة أصل' -> 'إضافة عهدة'" -m "   - 22 string replacements across Assets / MyAssets / assetExport" -m "   - Sidebar nav labels updated to 'عهدتي' and 'إدارة العهد'" -m "2\) FAQ shortcuts visibility bug fixed:" -m "   - Filter categories had trailing spaces \('PUU ', 'windows '\)" -m "   - FAQ entries used no-space versions \('PUU', 'WINDOWS'\) -> no match -> hidden" -m "   - Normalized both sides to clean 'WINDOWS' and 'GENERAL' codes" -m "3\) Activity Log dual view:" -m "   - New toggle: Table \(default\) vs Cards" -m "   - Table shows all 10 columns: event/user/email/role/IP/city/country/browser/reason/time" -m "   - Default limit raised from 10 to 50" -m "4\) Deferred: per-user permissions system \(#2\) — needs scope confirmation")

Bash(git -C /c/Users/lenovo/Desktop/fin commit -m "feat: comprehensive activity logging \(file + DB\) + granular per-user permissions" -m "1\) ACTIVITY LOGGING — files in server/logs/" -m "- logActivity\(\) writes to:" -m "  • logs/activity.log \(master, append-only\)" -m "  • logs/activity-YYYY-MM-DD.log \(daily rotation for easy review\)" -m "- New utils/activityTracker.js with recordActivity\(req, action, extra\)" -m "- Mirrors to SecurityLog DB so it also appears in the in-app Activity page" -m "- Wired into asset.create/update/delete/assign/return" -m "- Wired into user.create/delete/password_changed/permissions_changed" -m "- LOGS_DIR is configurable via env var \(default 'logs'\)" -m "2\) PERMISSIONS SYSTEM" -m "- New User.permissions JSON column \(idempotent migration\)" -m "- utils/permissions.js: catalog of 12 permissions across 5 groups" -m "  \(Assets, Users, Tickets, Billing, Audit\)" -m "- requirePermission\(key, fallbackRoles\) middleware" -m "- GET /api/users/permissions/catalog — returns full catalog" -m "- PUT /api/users/:id/permissions — admin updates a user's permissions" -m "- SUPER_ADMIN always returns true \(god-mode\)" -m "- Other SUPER_ADMINs protected from permission edits" -m "- Asset routes converted to use requirePermission so granted users can act" -m "- Permissions changes audited via recordActivity" -m "3\) FRONTEND" -m "- New Permissions modal in Users page \(Shield icon button per card\)" -m "- Visible only to ADMIN/SUPER_ADMIN" -m "- Grouped checkboxes by category with permission keys as monospace hint" -m "- Saves via PUT and refreshes the user list")

Bash(git -C /c/Users/lenovo/Desktop/fin commit -m "feat: sidebar/route guards honor granular permissions + log files download UI" -m "1\) Permissions actually unlock UI now \(was being granted but UI not adjusting\):" -m "   - MainLayout nav items now carry a 'permissions' array" -m "   - Sidebar shows item if user has role OR any of its permissions" -m "   - 'إدارة العهد' opens for anyone with ASSET_CREATE/EDIT/DELETE/ASSIGN" -m "   - 'المستخدمين' opens with USER_CREATE/DELETE/RESET_PW" -m "   - 'سجل النشاط' opens with VIEW_LOGS" -m "   - 'سلة المحذوفات' opens with VIEW_TRASH" -m "   - RoleGuard updated to accept and check permissions too" -m "   - App.jsx routes pass the matching permission list" -m "2\) Log files accessible from the website:" -m "   - GET /api/security/log-files — list files \(ADMIN/SUPER_ADMIN\)" -m "   - GET /api/security/log-files/:name — download \(path-traversal protected by SAFE_NAME regex\)" -m "   - 'ملفات اللوقات' button in SecurityLogs header" -m "   - Modal lists every file in server/logs/ with size + mtime + download button" -m "   - Helpful banner reminds files are ephemeral on Railway; DB view is permanent")

Bash(git -C /c/Users/lenovo/Desktop/fin commit -m "fix\(perms\): permissions reach the frontend \(login + profile refresh + socket push\)" -m "Bug: granted permissions had no effect because the frontend never received them." -m "1\) Login response now includes permissions + location" -m "2\) AuthContext fetches /api/auth/profile on mount to refresh stale localStorage" -m "3\) New refreshProfile\(\) helper exposed via useAuth\(\)" -m "4\) When admin updates permissions, backend emits 'permissions_updated' to user_<id> room" -m "5\) MainLayout listens for that event, calls refreshProfile\(\), shows toast '🔓 تم تحديث صلاحياتك'" -m "Result: granting a permission to a logged-in user makes the new sidebar section appear within seconds — no re-login needed.")

Bash(git -C /c/Users/lenovo/Desktop/fin commit -m "fix\(perms\): permission holders can now READ asset/user lists \(not just write\)" -m "Bug: granted ASSET_CREATE but Assets page still 403'd on GET /api/assets, /api/users, /api/assets/categories, /api/assets/stats" -m "Root cause: I had only converted POST/PUT/DELETE to use requirePermission. The READ endpoints \(GET\) still used authorize\(\) which is role-only." -m "Fixes:" -m "- New requireAnyPermission\(keys, fallbackRoles\) middleware" -m "- ASSET_PERMS / USER_PERMS bundle constants" -m "- GET /api/assets, /api/assets/stats, /api/assets/by-user/:id → any ASSET_* perm works" -m "- POST/PUT /api/assets/categories → ASSET_EDIT works \(was role-only\)" -m "- GET /api/users → any USER_* OR ASSET_* perm works \(asset page needs the users dropdown\)" -m "- POST/DELETE/PUT user endpoints converted to requirePermission with specific keys" -m "Now: an EMPLOYEE granted ASSET_CREATE+ASSET_ASSIGN can open the Assets page, see the list, see the users dropdown, and add+assign custodies.")
Bash(awk '/^export const/ { fn=$3 } /isPrivileged|isManager/ { print fn ":" NR }' /c/Users/lenovo/Desktop/fin/server/controllers/assetController.js)

Bash(git -C /c/Users/lenovo/Desktop/fin commit -m "fix\(perms\): remove duplicate inner role checks that bypassed route middleware" -m "Found that controllers still had isPrivileged\(\)/isManager\(\) inner checks." -m "Route middleware \(requirePermission / canReadAssets\) was passing permission-holders through, but the controller's first line immediately rejected them with 403." -m "Removed inner role checks from:" -m "- getAssets, getAssetsByUser, getAssetStats \(route now allows any ASSET_* perm\)" -m "- createAsset \(route now allows ASSET_CREATE\)" -m "- updateAsset \(route now allows ASSET_EDIT\)" -m "- deleteAsset \(route now allows ASSET_DELETE\)" -m "- assignAsset, returnAsset \(route now allows ASSET_ASSIGN\)" -m "- addMaintenance" -m "Kept the check in getAssetById that lets employees view only their own asset \(intentional self-service behavior\)." -m "Now permissions actually work end-to-end: granted EMPLOYEE can load list, see categories + users dropdown, add and assign custodies.")

Bash(awk '/^export const/ { fn=$3 } /req\\.user\\.role !== |role !== '"'"'SUPER_ADMIN'"'"'|isProtectedSuperAdmin/ { print fn ":" NR ": " $0 }' /c/Users/lenovo/Desktop/fin/server/controllers/userController.js)

Bash(git -C /c/Users/lenovo/Desktop/fin commit -m "fix\(perms\): Users page action buttons honor granular permissions" -m "Bug: granted USER_CREATE/DELETE/RESET_PW but the action buttons stayed hidden because the Users page only checked role." -m "Now each action button has its own gate:" -m "- 'إضافة موظف جديد' button → canCreate \(role OR USER_CREATE\)" -m "- 'تفعيل الموظف' button → canCreate" -m "- Eye / Key \(view + change password\) → canResetPw \(role OR USER_RESET_PW\)" -m "- Trash \(delete\) → canDelete \(role OR USER_DELETE\)" -m "- Shield \(permissions\) → admin role only \(intentional\)" -m "Backend authorization unchanged — already permission-aware.")

Bash(git -C /c/Users/lenovo/Desktop/fin commit -m "feat\(perms\): permissions work end-to-end on tickets, trash, invoices, logs" -m "Backend route updates \(all permission-aware\):" -m "- POST /api/tickets/:id/restore → TICKET_DELETE \(or privileged role\)" -m "- GET  /api/tickets/deleted   → VIEW_TRASH \(or privileged role\)" -m "- PUT  /api/tickets/:id       → TICKET_CLAIM or INVOICE_APPROVE \(or privileged\)" -m "- DELETE /api/tickets/:id     → TICKET_DELETE \(or privileged role\)" -m "- POST /api/tickets/:id/delete → TICKET_DELETE \(or privileged role\)" -m "- DELETE /api/tickets/:id/force → admin role only \(kept restrictive\)" -m "- GET /api/security/logs       → VIEW_LOGS \(or admin role\)" -m "- GET /api/security/log-files  → VIEW_LOGS \(or admin role\)" -m "Controllers: removed leftover inner role checks in securityController." -m "Frontend Tickets.jsx — new permission helpers:" -m "- canClaimTickets   = role OR TICKET_CLAIM   → controls 'استلام الطلب' button" -m "- canDeleteTickets  = role OR TICKET_DELETE  → controls list + modal delete buttons" -m "- canApproveInvoices = admin OR INVOICE_APPROVE → controls accept/reject billing buttons" -m "Net result: granting any single permission now unlocks exactly the corresponding UI elements + backend endpoints, no more / no less.")
